title: pixel.product.renderer.v1 Attachments Schema
description: File attachment declarations for Pixel Product Renderer. A product photo is required as input. All rendered output images are returned as output attachments.

file_roles.description: The source product photograph. The Responder performs background removal, segmentation, and feeds it into the rendering pipeline internally. The source image is not stored after processing.
First rendered product image. Always present when quantity >= 1.
Second rendered product image. Present when quantity >= 2.
Third rendered product image. Present when quantity >= 3.
Fourth rendered product image. Present when quantity = 4.
